hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && npm install --silent && cp -r "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tasks" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/src" && node_modules/.bin/tsc --target ES2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --strict --outDir "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/dist" --rootDir "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/src" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/src"/*.ts && echo "code-flow: deps installed and compiled") || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"
